revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[山口県]][[光市]]内にある[[建築物]]に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:ひかりし}} {{座標一覧}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{citation needed|ひかりし}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:光市の建築物|version=63934660}} {{translated page|ja|光市の建築物|2=Category:光市の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} [[Category:Buildings in Yamaguchi Prefecture by Municipality]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Hikari, Yamaguchi]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[ja:Category:光市の建築物]] [[ko:Category:히카리시의 건축물]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Nippon Steel Yawata Works]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]"

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q29900704)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
